title: To The Memory Of My Dear Daughter Kamala.
content:
The star that rose to cheer our humble life,
        And make a little heaven of our home,
        Shall rise again - yes, surely rise again
        To give us everlasting joy divine.
meaning:
Ramakrishna, T.'s contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "To The Memory Of My Dear Daughter Kamala."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
